leadText: The Rotom Bike (Japanese: ロトムじてんしゃ Rotom Bike) is a Key Item introduced in Generation VIII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Rotom Bike allows the player to travel faster on land and includes a boost that temporarily boosts the speed even further, but requires a recharge period afterwards before it can be used again. By talking to a Watt Trader in the Wild Area , the player can improve the Rotom Bike three times in exchange of Watts (1,000, 3,000, and 5,000), thus allowing for the recharge period to take less time to complete. After being upgraded with Water Mode, it also allows them to ride on water. In The Isle of Armor , the player can also change their bike's appearance to a "Sparkling White" or "Glistening Black" design, both of which come with particle effects resembling Shiny Pokémon and fully upgraded speed. The player can switch between the base Water Mode and the two alternatives at any time.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA S V Land Mode: This bike can be combined with the Pokémon Rotom to use a turbo boost. Water Mode: This bike can be combined with the Pokémon Rotom to not only do a turbo boost but also run on the water. Sparkling White: This bike can do a turbo boost and run on the water using Rotom's power. It's a sparkling white that shines brilliantly. Glistening Black: This bike can do a turbo boost and run on the water using Rotom's power. It's a glistening black that shines reddish-black.

Water Mode: This bike can be combined with the Pokémon Rotom to not only do a turbo boost but also run on the water. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method Sw Sh Land Mode: Route 5 (from a Doctor after defeating the Team Yell Grunts harassing him) Water Mode: Route 9 (from the Doctor after driving off the Team Yell Grunts, after defeating Hop in Circhester ) Sw Sh IA Sparkling White/Glistening Black: Fields of Honor (from the Bike Lady near the Master Dojo )

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] The Rotom Bike is implied to be produced by Macro Cosmos Tech through a poster in Motostoke .
